reforms.description: The French government aims to enable high-speed Internet access in all municipalities by 2007, providing financial aid to ensure coverage in areas lacking such access.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving internet access is expected to enhance productivity and innovation capabilities in underserved areas.
reforms.status_evidence: The initiative was announced with a target implementation year.
reforms.importance_rationale: While significant, the reform focuses on infrastructure rather than a broad systemic change.
reforms.source_quote: The government has an objective of enabling high speed Internet access in all French municipalities by 2007, which has led the government to provide financial aid to secure coverage for the large number of municipalities without high speed Internet access.

reforms.description: The local business tax, taxe professionnelle, has undergone significant changes to alleviate burdens on labor-intensive companies, including the gradual removal of the payroll-related part of the tax and the introduction of a ceiling on the tax based on value added.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Reducing tax burdens on labor-intensive companies is expected to encourage innovation and job creation.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been successfully implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant overhaul of the local business tax system.
reforms.source_quote: The payroll-related part of the tax was gradually removed and local government was compensated by transfers from central government funds.

reforms.description: The Ministry of Health introduced the 'Le plan Hôpital 2007' reform, which includes additional investment funds of €6 billion to improve the physical plant and materials in the hospital sector, overseen by a national agency.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Investing in hospital infrastructure is expected to enhance healthcare delivery and innovation in medical services.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been successfully implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform involves a substantial financial commitment to improve healthcare infrastructure.
reforms.source_quote: At the end of 2002, the Ministry of Health introduced a reform of the hospital sector (Le plan Hôpital 2007). This programme proposed a number of measures aimed at rectifying a number of these problems in the hospital sector.

reforms.description: The French government has proposed to ease bankruptcy procedures and reduce the financial risks associated with providing additional credit to encourage entrepreneurship and firm creation.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Easing bankruptcy procedures is expected to lower barriers to entrepreneurship and stimulate firm creation.
reforms.status_evidence: The proposal has been officially announced but not yet legislated.
reforms.importance_rationale: While significant, the reform is more of an adjustment to existing procedures rather than a comprehensive overhaul.
reforms.source_quote: Recognising the above issues, the government has proposed to ease bankruptcy procedures and reduce the financial risks associated with providing additional credit.
